name: multi-policy-distribution-failure
description: Three retention policies with different distribution failures: timeout, deleted mailbox, adaptive scope error

commands.command: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy -DistributionDetail | Format-List Name, DistributionStatus, DistributionResults, Enabled
commands.output:
Name                : Post-Migration Retention 1Y
DistributionStatus  : RetryDistribution
DistributionResults : {Exchange: PolicySyncTimeout, SharePoint: Success, OneDrive: Success}
Enabled             : True

Name                : Finance Records 7Y
DistributionStatus  : Error
DistributionResults : {Exchange: FailedToOpenContainer - The mailbox 'user.deleted@contoso.com' doesn't exist or has been deleted.}
Enabled             : True

Name                : APAC Adaptive Retention
DistributionStatus  : Error
DistributionResults : {Exchange: The AdaptiveScope query returned an error: Attribute 'customAttribute7' is not supported for the selected scope type.}
Enabled             : True

commands.command: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy "Post-Migration Retention 1Y" | Format-List ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, ModernGroupLocation
Get-AdaptiveScope "APAC Users Scope" | Format-List Name, FilterConditions, LocationType
commands.output:
Name              : APAC Users Scope
FilterConditions  : (customAttribute7 -eq "APAC")
LocationType      : User

Name: Post-Migration Retention 1Y
DistributionStatus: RetryDistribution
Enabled: True

Name: Finance Records 7Y
DistributionStatus: Error
Enabled: True

Name: APAC Adaptive Retention
DistributionStatus: Error
Enabled: True

Name: Post-Migration Rule
Policy: Post-Migration Retention 1Y
RetentionDuration: 365
RetentionComplianceAction: KeepAndDelete
Enabled: True

Name: Finance Records Rule
Policy: Finance Records 7Y
RetentionDuration: 2555
RetentionComplianceAction: KeepAndDelete
Enabled: True

Name: APAC Retention Rule
Policy: APAC Adaptive Retention
RetentionDuration: 1825
RetentionComplianceAction: KeepAndDelete
Enabled: True
